occupation: Chief Technology Officer at Lumo Digital Outdoor
headline: Lumo Digital Outdoor•1K followers
summary: I am CTO of a pioneering smart digital billboard company that fills a unique position in…

experiences.title: Chief Technology Officer
experiences.description: LUMO Digital Outdoor is a premium pure-play digital outdoor media business established to disrupt the existing model and help inspire greater creativity in the digital outdoor space. - Strategically drive the technical side of Lumo Digital - Discover and implement new technology onto the Lumo screen network - Design and implement Static and dynamic campaign management - Ayuda development and deployment - DOOH campaign development including API and bespoke integration - Software development - Client account management - Project management of new and exisiting screen builds - Research and development - Client and internal training - Project scoping and IT system documentation - New business development - Design and implementation of Live events and PR stunts Show less

experiences.title: Chief Technical Officer & Co-founder
experiences.description: Digital Out-Of-Home has taken its first step into real-time audience accountability via LENS, a purpose-built measurement tool designed specifically for road-side Digital OOH networks. Using multiple high-resolution cameras and specialised number plate recognition software, LENS delivers truthful insights of audiences as they travel past digital billboards every day. The key advantage of LENS is that it uses millions of data-points taken from site-based cameras to form the audience insights without any modelling, trickery or confusion. It is simply reporting what the cameras see 24/7 and live-streams the data to LENS’ central hub for interrogation. LENS can provide cumulative & unique reach, visitor frequency, site-based *demographics and *motor vehicle information including type, make, model and age. Show less

experiences.title: Director
experiences.description: Latch is an independent agency that specialises in custom OOH software solutions and DOOH DCO creative

experiences.title: European Software Sales Manager
experiences.description: VXL Software is a world leader in software for digital signage, mobile device management, enterprise device management, PC repurposing and thin-client migration. - Manage revenue, sales targets, and other KPIs for the region, work closely with VP of Sales - Hire, train and manage a growing sales team in the UK and Europe - Define key sales & marketing strategies for all regions - Create a Distributor Network across the UK and Europe - Core member in the development team for Illumineye Digital Signage suite - Assist resellers in complex digital signage system designs - Consulting to clients on digital technologies Show less

experiences.title: Sales Director
experiences.description: - Building the consultancy side of the business across the DOOH and digital signage sector, driving 33% business growth in less than 18 months. - Designing and implementing interactive digital campaigns across the UK, including: - Live screening of the Queen opening Birmingham New Street rail station. - CANNES LONNE awarding winning interactive domestic abuse campaign for Women’s Aid. - TeamGB# 2016 Olympic campaign. - ANPR digital project for Renault and BMW. - Interactive cycling safety campaign in central London for London Cycling (LLC). - Working mainly at C-Level CIO, CTO, SCO, COO as well as heads of departments, Director and senior Management - Leading a motivated sales team to deliver Quality equipment and support for the DOOH sector. - Consulting with clients on building Digital strategies. - Increasing my product knowledge on a regular basis through many sales and product courses Show less

experiences.title: Senior Corporate Business Development Manager
experiences.description: - Leading a team of motivated sales professionals to build and expand the client base into the corporate and banking sectors. - Leading the project management team to deliver two multi-million dollar audio visual contracts within the corporate banking and finance sector: Westpac Banking ($1.2m), ASB Bank ($2.6m). - Building and implementing strategic plans to expand the use of audio visual technology in client organisations. - Testing and implementing a new CRM system and ordering system across the company. - Winning and project managing the Best Bars Ltd new audio visual fit out. - Achieving all sales targets set for the year by 110%. Show less

experiences.title: Head of Digital Media
experiences.description: - Building and leading the new digital media side of the business, achieving an annual turnover of over $1million within 12 months. - Delivering benchmark digital campaigns and projects for some of New Zealand’s major brands including Digital Signage for Vodafone Stores ($165k), digital campaign for PowerAde ($25k) and a full AV fit out of all Toni and Guy hair salons in New Zealand. - Creating new AV and digital media business from within the existing client base, and building a new AV client base for the business. - Delivering AV and digital signage (Scala) systems for a range of organisations across New Zealand. Show less

experiences.title: Project and Account Manager
experiences.description: - Top sales earner for four consecutive years; selling and deploying both large and small audio visual fit-outs for a wide range of corporate clients across New Zealand, including a $340k project for Ernst and Young’s New Zealand Head Office. - Managing Engineers, technicians and building contractors to run and complete large audio visual projects including a $500k project at the Air New Zealand Head office. - Implementing strategic plans for future-proofing the audio visual equipment sold to our large major corporate clients. - Working Nationally and International. - Successfully winning and implementing New Zealand’s largest ever AV tender for the Auckland University Business School, a $4.2M project completed on time and under budget. Show less

experiences.title: Project Manager
experiences.description: - Managing the end to end content design, build, installations, training and the ongoing client relationships for a range of large/medium size business. - Part of the development team for Inspired signage product. - Designing and deploying Inspired signage digital signage solutions across the UK.

Having worked with robin for over a year I can give him a solid recommendation. He managed several of my bigger projects and they went of without a hitch. Great to work with, and always a laugh, I miss working with him and look forward to future opportunities!!

Nicki Carter

I worked with Robin for a number of years at ProVision. He was great to work with, very customer focused with good work ethics.  Great at building good relationships with clients and always got the job done.
